args: export CADENCE_CODE_HOST=cursor; for root in "${CURSOR_PLUGIN_ROOT}" "$PWD" "$HOME/.cursor/plugins/cadence-code"; do bootstrap="$root/bin/cadence-code-mcp-bootstrap"; if [ -x "$bootstrap" ]; then exec bash "$bootstrap"; fi; done; echo "[cadence-code] ERROR: could not locate bin/cadence-code-mcp-bootstrap." >&2; exit 1
